name: Teriyaki Wing Dings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken wings at the joints and remove wing tips.
2. In a large bowl, combine lemon juice, catsup, soy sauce, vegetable oil, brown sugar, garlic powder, and pepper. Mix well and add the chicken wings, ensuring they are evenly coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least six hours or overnight, stirring occasionally.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Line a shallow baking pan with aluminum foil.
5. Arrange the marinated chicken wings on the prepared rack in the baking pan.
6. Bake for 40-45 minutes, basting frequently with the marinade.
7. Let leftovers cool before refrigerating.
